questions.scenario: A proposed `common_everything` role installs nginx, creates database users, edits SSH settings, deploys the app, and restarts unrelated services. Many plays call it because it is convenient. What is the best review concern?

options.text: The role hides too much unrelated behavior, so callers cannot easily understand the blast radius.
A role may contain only one task by Ansible syntax.
Roles are only for local development, not production.

questions.explanation: A role should package cohesive work. If it hides unrelated changes, reuse becomes harder to review and target safely.
